autoColoring.title: Auto Colorization
autoColoring.subtitle: AI-powered coloring for architectural drawings
autoColoring.uploadPlaceholder: Drag and drop or click to upload
autoColoring.resultsPlaceholderSubtitle: Upload an image and click Generate
autoColoring.coloringPrompt2D: Based on the 2D floor plan/drawing I uploaded, analyze and redraw it into a professionally color-rendered 2D top view floor plan following the original layout. Modern, clean, and sharp architectural style: thick clear walls, light tile floors for rooms, warm wood floors for bedrooms and living area, dark tile for bathrooms. Arrange modern 2D furniture icons accurately. Preserve room names/symbols/dimensions. High resolution, ultra-sharp, harmonious colors, subtle shadows for depth, strictly 2D top-down, no 3D perspective.
autoColoring.coloringPrompt3D: Analyze the input drawing and reconstruct it into a photorealistic 3D top-down perspective (axonometric top-view). Do not copy or re-describe the original image. Keep all wall positions, windows, and furniture exactly as drawn. Do not redesign, rotate, or move any details. Maintain exact proportions, wall thickness, and layout. Apply the {{designStyle}} design style. Use materials, colors, lighting, and tones according to that style. Camera angle: 45-degree diagonal top-down axonometric. No distortion, no fisheye. Result must be a realistic, bright 3D top-view perspective with soft natural light and warm interior lights. 8K quality render, ultra-sharp, realistic materials like fabric, wood, stone, and glass. If the AI misunderstands, create a new image from scratch without copying the original.
autoColoring.analysisPrompt: Analyze the reference image and generate a structured architectural style description. Focus only on materials, lighting, color tones, and presentation style. Do not describe layout, function, or furniture arrangement.
autoColoring.final3DPromptPrefix:
Analyze the input drawing and create a new image based on this 2D architectural technical drawing.
Do not copy or re-describe the original image.
Reconstruct this drawing into a photorealistic 3D top-down perspective (axonometric top-view).

Keep all wall positions, windows, and furniture exactly as drawn.
Do not redesign, rotate, or move any details.
Maintain exact room proportions, wall thickness, and floor plan layout. Camera angle: 45-degree diagonal top-down axonometric.
No distortion, no fisheye, no excessive depth.
Result: Surreal 3D top-view perspective, bright and clear, matching original layout,
incorporating lighting, materials, and color tones from the reference image.
autoColoring.analysisError: Failed to analyze reference image. Please try again.
autoColoring.historyEmptySubtitle: Your generated results will appear here.
autoColoring.generationErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please check your connection or try again later.
autoColoring.noImageGeneratedError: Sorry, the model could not generate an image from your input. Please try adjusting your description or image.

3dSketch.title: 3D to Artistic Sketch
3dSketch.subtitle: Transform 3D images into beautiful sketches with various artistic styles
3dSketch.historyEmptySubtitle: Your generated sketches will appear here.
3dSketch.generationErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please check your connection or try again later.
3dSketch.noImageGeneratedError: Sorry, the model could not generate a sketch. Please try a different image.
3dSketch.sketchPromptPencil: Architectural ink and pencil hand sketch style, technical yet artistic.
3dSketch.sketchPromptPencil2: An ultra-realistic architectural pencil drawing of the building in the photo, hand-drawn directly on an ivory-colored rough paper sketchbook. The building is rendered entirely in gray pencil, with fine lines, high detail, no color, no ink, no watercolor. Proportions and perspective are kept exactly like the original. Traditional cross-hatching techniques for shading and depth. Visible paper texture, pencil dust, and eraser marks for realism. A real hand holding a pencil is sketching details in the foreground. Professional architect sketch style, completely handmade feel, soft natural light, no digital effects.
3dSketch.sketchPromptWatercolor: Architectural watercolor concept sketch with ink lines and soft wash tones.
3dSketch.sketchPromptVanGogh: A portrait painting in the style of Vincent van Gogh, inspired by “The Starry Night”, featuring expressive post-impressionist brushstrokes, swirling skies, vivid blue and yellow tones, thick impasto oil texture, and emotional lighting with artistic energy.
3dSketch.sketchPromptd5: Use the uploaded image as the ONLY visual reference. Do NOT change the architecture, proportions, or layout. Create a high-quality architectural exterior render of a single-story traditional Vietnamese house with a pitched tiled roof and front veranda, rendered in pure clay / monochrome style. Architecture: Preserve roof shape, columns, doors, steps. Layout: Traditional proportions, calm and grounded. Materials: Warm light gray/off-white clay, matte surface, soft micro roughness. Lighting: Soft overcast daylight, diffuse global illumination. Camera: Eye-level, natural perspective. Output: Photorealistic 4K render, sharp focus, no color, no textures.

realisticModel.title: 3D TO REALISTIC SCALE MODEL
realisticModel.subtitle: Turn 3D views into hyper-realistic model photographs with multiple choices
realisticModel.historyEmptySubtitle: Your generated photos will appear here.
realisticModel.generationErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please check your connection or try again later.
realisticModel.noImageGeneratedError: Sorry, the model could not generate an image. Please try a different input.
prompts: A hyper-realistic 3D scene of a modern architectural meeting room: – A director in a dark suit sits at the center of a large wooden conference table, pointing at a detailed architectural model... Several engineers wearing safety helmets sit around the table. Warm professional lighting, 8K resolution.

Create a 1/7 scale realistic model of the building from the picture, in a realistic style, in a real environment. The figurine is placed on a computer desk in a natural cozy architectural environment in front of a window. Content on screen shows modeling process.

A surreal photo of an architect's workbench, accompanied by a detailed miniature model of the building. Scattered tools, instructions, and a computer screen showing wireframe. Professional studio shot, cinematic composition.

Architect's desk with a detailed model of a modern, two-story house. White walls, dark gray roof, lush greenery. Behind the model is a line-art blueprint on a large screen. Room filled with natural light from a large window.

Using the provided house model as the subject, show architect's hands carefully holding the model at desk level above a large technical drawing. Scaffolding and workers visible through the window. Bright daylight, cinematic details.

Hands holding the house model at desk level, angled over a sheet showing 2D elevations. Real-scale building under construction visible through background window. Scaffolding, workers, photorealistic detail.

An architect’s desk showing the full design journey. Large sheet with 2D elevation drawings (AutoCAD style). Miniature model on transparent acrylic base. Construction site visible in background through window. Cinematic, ultra-detailed.
Close-up of an architectural mockup model, axonometry view, bokeh, highly detailed clean materials (foam board, wood, acrylic). Placed on a presentation table under soft studio lighting.
Generate an image of the project as if it were a physical cardboard model. Clean volumes, simplified textures, kraft brown and white tones. Soft shadows, simple lighting enhancing volumetry.

Shrink the building into a scale model (1:50 to 1:200). Place inside a transparent mini glass aquarium on a desk. Clear water, light blue light, caustic effects, pebbles, small plants and fish. Studio lighting, 8K hyper-realistic.

Create an architectural scale model photo. Physical model on a studio table, eye-level frontal view. Parallel to facade, white/cream matte finish. Soft natural light, blurred background, professional photography style.

toVideo.uploadPlaceholder: Drag and drop or click to upload up to 30 images
toVideo.storyFlowPlaceholder: Story Flow summary will appear here after analysis...
toVideo.analysisPrompt:
Based on the provided set of architectural images (numbered 0 to N-1), please perform two tasks:
1. Reorder the images into a logical sequence to form a seamless video script that tells a consistent story about the space.
2. Write a video script summarizing that story flow, from overview to detail, or as a spatial journey.

Return the result as a single JSON object with this exact structure:
{
  "script": "(Your video script content here)",
  "imageOrder": [image_index_1, image_index_2, ...]
}
'imageOrder' must contain all original indices from 0 to N-1 without duplicates.
toVideo.analysisError: Sorry, an error occurred during analysis. Please try again.
toVideo.motionPromptGenerationPrompt: You are an expert video prompter for the Veo AI model. Based on the provided video script and the set of {{imageCount}} images in order, generate a distinct 8-second video prompt for each image. Each prompt must describe dynamic camera movement or scene development matching its part of the script. Return as a JSON array.

editPage.uploadPlaceholder: Click, paste, or drag & drop an image
editPage.finalResultPlaceholder: Your final image will appear here
editPage.detailZoomPrompt: Perform a 'detail zoom' on the masked area. Reconstruct ONLY the masked region with high detail, texture, and clarity as a close-up shot. Blend seamlessly with unmasked parts. Suggestion: '{{suggestion}}'
editPage.detailZoomPrompt_v2: Upgrade and reconstruct this cropped image into a new version, showing architectural details, colors, and materials while preserving lighting and context. Add realistic textures. Improve quality. Suggestion: '{{suggestion}}'

sidebar.cameraAngleAndCompositionPlaceholder: Select or describe a camera angle
cameraAngleAndCompositionSuggestions: Wide angle from entrance: Full panoramic view showing overall layout.
Close-up on main display: Focus on specific products, highlighting details.
Eye-level from seating area: Friendly perspective of experience space.
Bird's eye view: High-angle view showing floor layout and arrangement.
Close-up on unique decor: Emphasize branding and unique accents.
View from inside fitting room: Show privacy, comfort, and lighting quality.
Organized product layout: High aesthetic, organized, and easy to view.
Reflection through mirrors: Create depth and visual interest.
Close-up on interior materials: Highlight quality and sophistication.
Partial view with natural light: Focus on light interaction and atmosphere.
renderQualityStyles: Photorealistic 8K – PBR Ultra Realism, HDR lighting, accurate reflections.
Cinematic Soft HDR – Filmic Tone, soft light, slight DOF, subtle grain.
Neutral Realistic – Balanced Light, accurate materials, natural contrast.
Studio Sharp – Clear Light & Reflection, high sharpness, controlled lamps.
Soft Natural – Warm Daylight Realism, gentle lighting, natural noise.
Moody Cinematic – Dark Contrast HDR, directional lighting, deep tones.
Artistic Concept – Stylized Mood, creative lighting and colors.
Filmic Vintage – Warm LUT + Grain, Kodak-style tones, soft contrast.
Digital Clean – Minimal Clear Look, clean white light, no noise.
Hyperreal – Super Sharp + HDR Reflections, physically-based lighting.

timeAndClimate.title: Time and Climate

timeAndClimate.note: *Choose from the suggested filters below or describe yourself.

timeAndClimateTemplate.title: Time & Climate settings
timeAndClimateTemplate.placeholder: Please choose your preferred Time & Climate setting.
options: On a clear summer morning, the air is cool and fresh, and gentle natural light shines obliquely from the side.
Late in the morning, the sun shone gently, the air was fresh, and natural light spread evenly.
At midday, the sun was strong, shining directly and clearly, and the air was dry and bright.
In the afternoon, the sun was high and strong, casting clear shadows, the air was mildly warm, and the atmosphere felt energetic.
In the late afternoon, the sunlight slanted low, the air softened, and the warm, gentle light created depth.
At sunset, the warm, golden light shines intensely at an angle, creating a tranquil and emotionally charged atmosphere.
At the transition from day to night, natural light fades, and the air becomes calm and quiet.
At night, in an urban setting, the combination of streetlights and architectural lighting creates a vibrant atmosphere.
The weather is cloudy, with diffused light, few shadows, and a neutral and stable atmosphere.
The sky was overcast, the light was weak and soft, the air was slightly humid, and the atmosphere was somber and quiet.
After the rain, the air is fresh, the sunlight reflects softly, and it feels fresh and clean.
The autumn air is cool, the light is soft, and the atmosphere is gentle and pleasant.
The winter air is dry and cold, the light is cool, and the atmosphere is calm and clear.
The tropical climate, with its strong sunshine combined with high humidity and abundant natural light, creates a vibrant and lively atmosphere.
The night was clear, the air cool, the ambient light dim, and it felt peaceful.

Suburban street, modern low-rise buildings, bright walls

cameraAngleSuggestions: Frontal View: Clear facade, strong architectural statement.
Eye-level View: Natural perspective, authentic human scale.
Street-level View: Realistic feel, integrated into urban context.
3/4 View / Oblique Angle: Spatial depth, showing both facade and side.
High-angle / Flycam View: Overview of plot, garden, and surroundings.
Low-angle View: Majestic, imposing, emphasizes height and modernity.
Distant View: Building within broad context (city, mountain, seaside).
Opposite-side View: Realistic feel with street foreground and trees.
Street Perspective View: Cinematic, urban depth, suitable for sunset.
Corner View: Increased depth, dynamic and modern composition.
Courtyard View: Private, intimate, looking from inside out.
Drone Sunset View: Cinematic emotion, warm light, long shadows.
Night Street View: Suitable for night renders, yellow lights on wet roads.
Rainy / Wet View: Authentic mood, vivid light reflections.
3/4 Right View from inside cafe/lobby: Realistic foreground depth.
Reflection Shot: Mirror effect on building from wet road.
Framed through foliage: Using trees/leaves for depth.
Dusk transition: Late sunset on a cloudy day, peaceful atmosphere.

***IV. NEIGHBORING HOUSES – RESIDENTIAL CONTEXT

VI. LIGHT – WATER – SPACE

VII. TRAFFIC – ACTIVITY – MOTION
A silver car moving through the frame.
A distant pedestrian creating a realistic feel.
A person cycling past, subtle reflections on the road.

VIII. HOUSE LOCATION – STREET CORNER
Corner house at an intersection with 2 facades.
House between two others, 1 facade (typical townhouse).
End of the street, open space in front.
At a multi-street junction, dynamic depth angle.
Part of a synchronized row, identical facades.
IX. TROPICAL ELEMENTS – NATURE FEEL
Natural tropical plants, leaves casting soft shadows.
X. GARDEN
Spacious villa grounds, surrounded by meticulous garden and fence.

templateDescriptionPrompts: Realistic architectural photo of a modern tropical building, priority on green space and natural materials. Modern-Tropical style. Context: Urban residential area. Materials: natural wood for gate/doors, black metal railings, stone cladding on fence base, light brown concrete effect walls. Environment: Diverse greenery on balconies, two lush trees on sidewalk. Camera: Frontal shot from across the street, eye-level, full facade, wide-angle.

Realistic architectural photo of a townhouse, modern tropical architecture, open space, greenery, and natural shading. Context: Quiet residential area next to a natural grass lot. Materials: light gray concrete effect walls, charcoal powder-coated metal louvers/gate, natural wood ceiling, black aluminum frames. Environment: Tropical balcony greenery, king palms, decorative bananas. Camera: Street-level view, authentic Vietnam urban context.

Surreal architectural photo of a modern townhouse, Modern-Tropical style, new suburban residential zone. Environment: Open surroundings, few high-rises, new internal roads, cement paving. Blue sky, few clouds, soft morning light. Foreground: dark green leaves from top edge with rim light. Distant low-rise houses with power lines. Camera: Frontal View, symmetrical composition, 8K quality render.

Ultra-realistic architectural photo of [YOUR BUILDING], taken on a sunny morning in a modern Vietnamese neighborhood. Straight frontal facade shot at eye-level, 24mm architectural lens with perfect verticals. Natural daylight with clear blue sky, tree shadows on facade, bright reflections on glass. Warm harmonious palette: pure white, dark wood, fresh greenery. 8K ultra-photorealistic render.

Hyper-realistic cinematic architectural photo of [YOUR BUILDING], located in a modern Vietnamese residential area. Captured at dusk after a light rain under a clear blue-gray sky. Wet road surface with clear building reflections. A modern silver car moving from right to left, slight motion blur. Warm interior lights glowing through large glass windows, creating attractive warm-cool contrast. 8K render.
exteriorAngleSuggestions: Frontal View: Symmetrical composition, clear facade, strong architectural statement.
Eye-level View: Natural perspective, balanced and authentic scale.
Street-level View: Realistic feel, integrated into Vietnamese urban landscape.
3/4 Left View: Spatial depth, showing facade and left side, harmonious layout.
3/4 Right View: Spatial depth, showing facade and right side, harmonious layout.
High-angle View: Overview of the entire plot, garden, and landscape.
Low-angle View: Majestic and imposing, emphasizes height and modernity.
Distant View: Building within broad context (city, mountain, seaside).
Opposite-side View: Realistic feel with street, trees, or vehicles in foreground.
Street Perspective: Cinematic urban depth with street lights, suitable for sunset.
Intersection Corner View: Dynamic layout showing multiple sides.
Courtyard View: Private and intimate perspective from the yard.
Drone Sunset View: Cinematic emotion with warm light and long shadows.
Night Street View: Suitable for night renders, yellow lights on wet roads.
Rainy / Wet View: Realistic mood with vivid reflections.
3/4 Right Interior-to-Exterior View: Depth from inside out.
Reflection Shot: Mirror effect on building from wet road.
Framed through foliage: Using leaves to create a natural foreground frame.
Day-to-Night transition: Warm cozy atmosphere, artificial and LED lighting.
Framed through flower canopy: Artistic distant view.
Dusk transition: Late sunset on a cloudy day, peaceful atmosphere.
interiorAngleSuggestions: Wide Panorama: From main door showing overall layout, natural light, 16-24mm.
Corner 45°: Wide living room view, visual depth and balance.
Full Room Corner: Highlighting room proportions and ceiling height.
Interior Drone View: High top-down illusion of overall layout.
Connected Open Space: Living-Kitchen-Dining flow.
Vertical Hallway View: Depth and natural light at the end.
TV Wall / Large Cabinet: 90° frontal, showing materials and lighting.
Bed Headboard: Frontal view showing bed, lamps, and wall decor.
Kitchen Backsplash: Frontal view showing cabinets, stone, and metal.
Hallway Gallery Wall: Showing art, frames, and longitudinal light.
3/4 Wall View: 30-45° tilt to show surface and depth.
Eye-level Sofa View: Balanced composition with natural light.
View from Sofa: Looking towards balcony/TV, lifestyle perspective.
Dining to Kitchen: Warm lighting, 35-50mm lens.
Kitchen to Living: Spatial connection perspective.
Arched Frame View: Artistic layering through doors/screens.
Sunlit Hallway: Emphasizing natural light and direction.
Macro Material Intersection: Floor-Wall-Light details.
Lifestyle Decor: Close-up on vases, frames, and emotional items.
Texture Close-up: Focus on material surface with raking light.
Morning Curtain Light: Warm and authentic morning atmosphere.
Bedroom Accent Light: Relaxing and sophisticated evening mood.
Detail Craftsmanship: Close-up on handles, joints, or wood grain.
Mirror/Glass Reflection: Creating depth and artistic atmosphere.
Low Floor Angle: Exaggerated scale, emphasizes luxury height.
High Ceiling Angle: Focus on furniture layout and planning.
Human Interaction: Subtle motion for liveliness.
Early Morning Rays: Natural and fresh spirit.
Golden Hour Interior: Warm tones, luxurious cinematic mood.
Cool-to-Warm transition: Day-to-night lighting simulation.

errors.transformFailed: Could not transform image. Please try another.
errors.transformError: An unexpected error occurred during transformation.

prompts.aiEnvironmentSuggestionPrompt: Based on the architecture '{{constructionType}}' in '{{designStyle}}' style within '{{locationContext}}' context, suggest exactly 10 matching environmental characteristics to highlight the building in a surreal render. Return as a JSON array of 10 strings.
prompts.aiMaterialSuggestionPrompt: Analyze the input architectural image. Identify and list all primary application materials seen. For each, provide a detailed description including type, surface (matte, gloss, etc.), and reflectivity (low, medium, high). Return as a JSON array of strings.
prompts.analysisPrompt: Analyze the reference image to identify: lighting direction, intensity, and color; overall color palette and tones; emotion and atmosphere; materials and surroundings. Provide only this analysis, do not describe the building.
prompts.styleAnalysisPrompt: Analyze the provided image. Extract general visual style, lighting, materials, and color tones. DO NOT describe layout or geometry. Return as JSON.
prompts.filterAnalysisPrompt:
Analyze the provided architectural image and extract key attributes into a JSON object. Descriptions must be creative and accurate. Do not use preset lists. Return only the JSON object.

Attributes: constructionType, designStyle, locationContext, appliedMaterials (array), environmentalCharacteristics (array), distantContext, season, timeOfDay, weatherCondition, toneAndMood, cameraAngle.
prompts.interiorFilterAnalysisPrompt: Analyze the provided interior image and extract attributes into a JSON object. Attributes: roomType, interiorDesignStyle, contextLocationViewDescription, mainColorTone, materialDescription, lightingSystemDescription, lightToneDescription, timeAndClimateDescription, cameraAngleAndComposition. Return only JSON.
prompts.finalRenderWithStyleJsonPrompt:
Based on the style defined in this JSON:
{{styleJson}}

Create a new, surreal image using the provided base drawing. The drawing defines geometry and layout. Apply style, lighting, materials, and tones from the JSON analysis.

Constraints: Only use JSON descriptions and base drawing. Maintain drawing layout. Result must be a new render with the same visual tone.
prompts.finalRenderPrompt: Based on this style analysis: '{{styleDescription}}'. Create a surreal photo of the project in the input image. Apply all lighting, environment, tones, and emotions from that analysis. Do not copy buildings from the reference, only the atmosphere. Output must look like a professional DSLR photo, 8K, sharp, HDR.
prompts.defaultRenderPrompt: Create a surreal photo of the building in the input image. The result should look like a professional DSLR photo, high quality, HDR, sharp, no noise.
prompts.creativeFilterPrompt_part1: Create a surreal photo of a {{constructionType}} in {{designStyle}} style
prompts.creativeFilterPrompt_part2: , based on input image. Result must look like a professional DSLR photo, high quality, 8K, HDR, sharp.
prompts.interior_prompt: A surreal interior photo of a {{roomType}} in {{designStyle}} style. Natural light flowing through windows, soft shadows. Must look like professional DSLR photo, high resolution, HDR.
prompts.suggestAngleGeneral: Suggest a creative and beautiful camera angle for the provided architecture image. One concise sentence. Example: 'Low-angle shot from the garden looking up, emphasizing majesty.'
prompts.suggestAngleZoom: Suggest a beautiful close-up or zoom angle highlighting architectural details, materials, or light. One concise sentence. Example: 'Close-up of teak wood facade texture under afternoon light.'
prompts.suggestAngleError: Could not generate suggestion. Please try again.

prompt_conditional.part1: A realistic architectural photo of {{constructionType}}, {{designStyle}} style
prompt_conditional.environment: Surroundings include {{environmentalCharacteristics}}, in harmony with nature.
prompt_conditional.part2_prefix: Balanced HDR lighting, harmonious natural and artificial sources, cinematic effects.
prompt_conditional.cameraAngle_clause: Perspective: {{cameraAngle}}, DSLR full-frame wide-angle, golden ratio composition.
prompt_conditional.part2_suffix: 8K photorealistic cinematic render, HDR, sharp details, natural reflections, soft shadows.

new_prompts.environment: Surroundings: {{environmentalCharacteristics}}, in harmony with natural landscape.
new_prompts.lighting_hyper: Cinematic HDR lighting, soft reflections, clear materials. 8K quality, deep details and volume.
new_prompts.lighting_realistic: Balanced natural light, soft reflections, authentic material details.
new_prompts.camera: Perspective: {{cameraAngle}}, DSLR full-frame wide-angle, soft DOF, golden ratio.

cameraAngleSuggestionModal.title: 🎥 USAGE GUIDE – CAMERA ANGLE & COMPOSITION FILTERS

sections.title: 🧭 1️⃣ True Objective of this Filter
sections.content:
Helps AI understand framing intent: whether you want overview – details – highlights – emotion – material
rather than just 're-rendering the space'.
When AI receives a base image + JSON style, it analyzes physics + tone + materials,
but without a perspective guide, it might render random layouts.
Composition guides tell the AI:

rows: Helps AI choose correct camera height

cameraAngleSuggestionModal.conclusion:
👉 Summary:
The 'Camera Angle & Composition' filter = Visual map for the AI camera.
Correct preset = AI understands 'what you want the viewer to see, from where, and with what emotion'.
Sync with Lighting & Materials for authentic DSLR architectural photos.
cameraAngleSuggestionModal.finalNote: Content and Copyright developed by www.f9render.com. Thank You!

colorPaletteSuggestionModal.title: 🎨 20 Main Color Tones – Expanded Interior AI Render Palette
colorPaletteSuggestionModal.subtitle: (Copy and Paste into the Color Palette section)

groups.title: 🧩 Group 1: Bright – Natural – Elegant
rows: Light wood, white, beige; neutral light; relaxing, clean space.
White gray beige, matte and satin surfaces; balanced light/shadow.
Light wood, daylight; fresh and energetic atmosphere.
Light stone, beige wood, 5000K daylight; balanced modern look.
Full white, strong daylight, even reflections; pure and clean.

groups.title: 🧩 Group 2: Warm – Luxury – Emotional
rows: Walnut wood, light stone, gold; 3500K light; cinematic and high-end.
Wood, linen, 4500K light; soft and intimate feel.
Leather, felt, light stone, amber light; deep and sophisticated.
Dark wood, soft yellow light, turquoise accents; nostalgic luxury.
Dark wood, dark stone, brass; 3000K light; mysterious and deep.

formula.title: 💡 Standard Description Formula (100% AI Understanding)
formula.template:
“Tone [Tone Name], [overall emotional description].
Lighting [type / Kelvin], material [main materials] creating [visual/emotional effect].”
formula.exampleText:
Tone Earthy Warm – Earth & Sand, 4000K warm light,
beige sand and natural wood materials for a rustic, natural feel.

suggestionModal.title: 💡 USAGE SUGGESTIONS
suggestionModal.combinationHeader: Instructions for selecting multiple groups (field tested)

rows.result: Balanced tone: warm (wood) + cool (stone) → luxurious, natural.
Soft light reflection, creating modern, luxury feel.
Beautiful reflection, bright clean tone, natural HDR.
Rustic, warm, natural, very suitable for townhouses.
Cold gray tone, strong contrast, clear.
Realistic, low reflection, very suitable for after rain scene.
Very balanced – gray, warm tone, soft light reflection.
Strong tone, industrial-art – only suitable for unique buildings.
If light is strong, AI easily causes "excessive reflective glass wall".
Too many different reflections → fake photo, unnatural.
Only use for luxury interior style render.

goldenRules.header: Golden rules when selecting multiple groups

rows.explanation: 2 is best, 3 is max. More than 4 groups → cluttered photo.

rows.rule: If using glass → don't choose too shiny stone
Don't choose >1 high reflective material at once
rows.explanation: AI will process light wrongly (mirror + glass + shiny stone = HDR burn).
If warm tone (wood, beige, cream) → avoid black stone or too cold stainless steel.

environmentSuggestions.title: 🌿 COMPREHENSIVE SUGGESTION LIST – ENVIRONMENT, LANDSCAPE & ARCHITECTURAL GARDEN
environmentSuggestions.instruction: Reference options below then Copy and Paste into Filter on the left

End of street, open space in front — use for villa or shophouse at end of row.
At intersection of many routes, suitable for dynamic view, having depth.

subsections.title: 🌳 Trees & Natural Elements

Tropical trees growing naturally, canopy casting light shadow.
A large tree casting light shadow on facade.

Vines covering lightly on wall, creating shade.

Leaves falling gently in wind, water surface rippling reflecting light.

subsections.title: 🚶 Lively Details – People & Motion
items: A silver car moving through frame.
A pedestrian far away creating realistic feel.
A person cycling past, light reflecting gently on road.
A small dog lying in front yard.
Small sign with unclear text, bringing Vietnamese street feeling.
There are utility poles and small cables in distance.
Utility pole casting slanted shadow.
Yellow street light reflecting on wet road surface.
Stone bench / fence / road sign — creating familiar urban space feel.
Foreground has dark green tree canopy reaching from top frame edge, small leaves, sparse, light reflecting around leaf edges (rim light), creating natural frame around sky.
Dark green tree canopy reaching gently from top frame edge, sparse small leaves catching backlight, leaf edges glowing soft bright, creating natural frame around sky.
Thin branches drooping from top frame, sunlight through each leaf gap, creating soft light rim around canopy, frame opens gently and airy.
From above, dark green canopy covering frame edge lightly, light casting silver rim through leaves, sky background behind slightly bright, clear and peaceful atmosphere.
From above, tree branch leaning down frame, leaf edges reflecting pale yellow light, scene enclosed by canopy like natural picture frame.
Dark green canopies mixed with pale yellow light, creating depth feeling harmonizing into sky in frame.
Green leaf shadows covering interwoven top frame edge, light shining down creating dotted light spots on background, peaceful and deep atmosphere.
Small thin canopy interwoven frame edge, backlight creating glowing leaf edge effect, frame suggests cool, natural and deep feeling.
Light through green canopy, shining on each leaf layer, creating sparkling and clear light.
Morning light through leaf gaps, creating soft light rim around canopy, bringing fresh feeling and full of light atmosphere.
Smooth green canopy interwoven top frame edge, light reflecting gently through leaves with warm bright color, creating natural frame embracing sky.
Small leaf branch reaching out from right corner frame, catching slanted pale yellow light, sparkling rim light on each leaf edge, scene suggests quiet morning feeling.
Sparse leaf clusters scattered top frame edge, light reflecting gently through each leaf, creating depth and soft light area.
Small thin canopy hanging gently in frame, slanted light shining through each leaf layer, suggesting fresh early morning feeling.
Dark green canopy patch crossing frame, afternoon light shining back, warm leaf edges creating harmonious frame around sky background.
Slanted light touching each leaf cluster, sunlight reflecting gently, scene carrying warmth and peace.
Tree branch hanging soft curving from above, backlight creating pure bright rim, frame opening full of fresh atmosphere.
Canopy interwoven frame edge, creating mixed light and shadow strip, light reflecting gently through leaves in summer noon.
Canopy leaning casting light down, yellow light falling diagonally, scene suggesting warm and close feeling.
Smallest leaf bush lighting lightly at frame edge, noon light radiating warm bright color, scene imbued with afternoon light.
Thin canopy leaning down, light slanted through, creating dotted light rim on leaves, scenery carrying soft depth.
Tall tree trunk reaching side frame edge, light through each leaf, pale yellow light rim covering lightly across soft depth.
Thick canopy light spreading reflecting on, slanted light glittering, frame becomes balanced and deep.
Small soft green leaf branch, slanted light creating warm yellow bright rim line, mixing between sunlight and mist.
Canopy hanging gently scattering backlight, leaf blade layer thin bright rim, sky behind clear blue, suggesting peaceful end of day feeling.

items: Front of building: grass carpet with stepping stone path, small bushes, young green leaves.

Balcony has concrete plant pot growing hanging vines, interspersed with a few small leaf plant pots; plants arranged evenly, creating soft border in front of glass railing, not blocking glass door.
A corner of yard has a few ornamental bamboo clumps, snake plants or ferns, creating neat layout, low maintenance.
Green color of trees stands out on white-gray-yellow wall background.

Houses on both sides equivalent height or slightly different, showing realism.

items: Modern Tropical Garden: large leaf plants (ornamental banana, fern, Japanese palm), grass carpet with slate path, soft reflection, humid air, cool green.
Zen Garden: white sand, natural stone, small bonsai, koi pond or water feature, static layout, meditation.
Traditional Vietnamese Garden: red brick yard, water jar, areca row, three-step staircase, rustic green trees.
Modern European Garden: even grass carpet, square plant pots, bright gravel path, wooden bench.
Minimalist Garden: few trees, neutral color tone, flat ground surface, trees planted symmetrically creating quiet feeling.

A large tree casting light shadow on yard and wall.
In-ground garden lights or small column lights illuminating trees.

sections.title: I. LANDSCAPE & SURROUNDING ENVIRONMENT BY BUILDING TYPE

subsections.title: 1. HOUSING GROUP
items: Apartment
Surrounding environment: modern urban area, high-rise, crowded residential area.
Landscape: internal park, landscape lake, internal road, playground, sports court, swimming pool.
Natural level: concentrated green patch, internal landscape, flower bed, urban night light.
Adjacent space: parking lot, shopping mall, ground floor shophouse, busy street.
Townhouse
Surrounding environment: adjacent street front, small alley, urban residential area.
Landscape: street trees, sidewalk, commercial facade, utility poles, signs, vehicles.
Natural: potted plants, green balcony, skylight, reflecting urban light.
Adjacent space: neighbor walls, interspersed tiled roofs, signs, iron gates, brick paved road.
Villa
Surrounding environment: high-class villa area, wide garden, quiet internal road.
Landscape: fish pond, grass carpet, green trees, low fence, stone paved path, abundant natural light.
Natural: large canopy trees, flower garden, grassy hill, water feature, private pool.
Adjacent space: other villas, fences, internal road, private driveway.
Garden House
Surrounding environment: suburban area, green space, near field or lake.
Landscape: fruit orchard, areca row, coconut range, large grass carpet, rockery, small pond.
Natural: natural light, field wind, bird scene, morning mist.
Adjacent space: brick paved path, tree hedge, wooden gate, porch.
Penthouse / Duplex
Surrounding environment: high floor of luxury apartment, city skyline, night lights.

Natural: skylight, clouds and sunset, miniature city view below.
Adjacent space: terrace, reflective glass, glass railing.
Resort / Holiday Villa

Landscape: infinity pool, stone paved path, sand beach, lounge chair, golden sunlight.
Natural: palm trees, sea waves, tropical flowers, clear blue sky.
Adjacent space: other villas, stone paved path, green trees, spa or bar area.
Homestay / Bungalow
Surrounding environment: hilly area, peaceful sea or village.
Landscape: wild grass, wildflowers, wooden fence, kitchen smoke, ancient tree.
Natural: open space, golden afternoon sun, bird sound, morning mist.
Adjacent space: other bungalows, gravel path, common living area.
Traditional / Ancient House
Surrounding environment: ancient village, brick gate, areca row, water well, brick yard.
Landscape: ancient tree, water jar, mossy tiled roof, earthen wall.
Natural: gentle sun, shade, field wind, country scent.
Adjacent space: communal yard, water well, field or small pond nearby.

outputImageSuggestionModal.title: 💡 USAGE SUGGESTIONS
outputImageSuggestionModal.subtitle: 🎨 COMMON ARCHITECTURAL PHOTO STYLE "FILTERS"

rows.keywords: realistic photo, shot on full-frame camera, natural lighting
rows.effect: Neutral colors, real life light, realistic materials

rows.keywords: hyper-realistic render, 8K, ultra-high detail, cinematic lighting
cinematic color tone, film still, volumetric light, anamorphic lens
rows.effect: Film style light, strong contrast, artistic atmosphere

rows.keywords: concept art, digital painting, stylized architecture
rows.effect: Unrealistic colors, soft strokes, non-physical light
Looks like render from 3D software, clean, accurate materials

rows.keywords: soft natural light, morning atmosphere, environmental tone
rows.effect: Soft light, gentle shadows, soft color tone

rows.keywords: night photo, blue hour, warm lights, reflections
rows.effect: Warm yellow light, glass reflection, purple blue sky
rows.usage: Building with lighting design, evening advertisement

rows.keywords: aerial view, drone perspective, high-angle shot

rows.effect: Construction site, cement, reinforced concrete, workers

rows.keywords: minimalist composition, clean lighting, simple background

realistic yet cinematic, balanced light, film tone

rows.keywords: golden hour light, warm shadows, cinematic sun
foggy morning, atmospheric light, deep haze
glass reflection, metal reflection, HDR lighting
rows.effect: Strong reflection on glass and metal

outputImageSuggestionModal.exampleTopic: A modern Tropical garden villa 2 stories, glass and natural teak wood facade, surrounded by water feature and trees.

examples.title: 1. Realistic Photo
examples.prompt: A realistic photo of modern Tropical garden villa project, shot with full-frame camera, wide angle, early morning natural light, realistic materials including clear glass and teak wood, neutral colors, in quiet green urban environment.
examples.result: Result: Photo looks like real life scene, soft light, natural materials.

examples.title: 2. Hyper-realistic Render
examples.prompt: A hyper-realistic render of modern Tropical garden villa, sunset light, strong reflection, 8K ultra-high detail, reflecting water surface, vivid trees, cinematic quality.
examples.result: Result: Impressively beautiful, yellow orange tone, "wow" effect, like advertising render.

examples.title: 3. Cinematic
examples.prompt: A cinematic scene of modern Tropical garden villa, volumetric light through trees, film color tone, anamorphic lens, warm and luxurious atmosphere.
examples.result: Result: Looks like a frame in a movie, hazy light, strong depth.

examples.title: 4. Architectural Render (CGI)
examples.prompt: A 3D render perspective of Tropical garden villa, daylight, V-Ray style render, ray-traced lighting, detailed material texture and realistic reflection.
examples.result: Result: Looks like photo exported from 3ds Max, very clean and balanced.

examples.title: 5. Natural Lighting (Environmental)
examples.prompt: Tropical garden villa in morning natural light, soft color tone, light breeze, soft tree shadows, a quiet and fresh scene.
examples.result: Result: Soft tone, bright, close, giving ecological feeling.

examples.title: 6. Night Scene / Twilight
examples.prompt: Tropical garden villa at night, warm yellow light from interior, reflecting on water surface, blue violet sky, soft diffused light.
examples.result: Result: Very beautiful for night scene, has hot-cold contrast.

examples.title: 7. Under Construction
examples.prompt: Modern Tropical garden villa project under construction, steel frame, scaffolding, workers, realistic ground and materials, noon natural light.
examples.result: Result: Vivid construction site photo, simulating realistic construction process.

examples.title: 8. Minimalist / Clean
examples.prompt: Modern Tropical garden villa, minimalist layout, even light, clean bright background, emphasizing architectural forms and wood-glass materials.
examples.result: Result: Very suitable for profile photo, architectural magazine.

examples.title: 9. Magazine / Editorial
examples.prompt: Architectural magazine style photo of modern Tropical garden villa, studio light combined with daylight, luxurious tone, balanced frame, light post-processing.
examples.result: Result: Beautiful like Architectural Digest magazine, refined light.

examples.title: 10. Golden Hour
examples.prompt: Tropical garden villa in golden hour light, long shadows, golden reflection on glass and teak wood, warm and romantic atmosphere.
examples.result: Result: Emotional, high art, very beautiful for poster.

examples.title: 11. Atmospheric / Foggy
examples.prompt: Tropical garden villa in early morning mist, hazy light, wet trees, reflecting blurred lake, quiet and deep atmosphere.
examples.result: Result: Suggests "dreamy" feeling, very cinematic and natural.

examples.title: 12. Cinematic Naturalism
examples.prompt: A cinematic but natural photo of modern Tropical garden villa, morning light, soft contrast, light film tone, realistic materials.
examples.result: Result: Beautiful like movie but still believable as real photo — very balanced.
